name: To you with greetings
overview: Khaled and Amina are a simple couple, who cooperate together in raising their children, which puts them in a constant challenge all the time, to solve their problems and obstacles that stand in their way, taking responsibility for Abu Khaled, who marries Naima and brings her problems with him.

trailers.title: مسلسل إليكم مع التحية الحلقة الأولى
